mission.title: kubevirt: Provide way to customize generated Multus pod annotation
mission.description:
**What this PR does / why we need it**:
When virt-controller is generating the Multus pod annotation, several properties can be set:
- `name`
- `namespace`
- `interface`
- `mac` _(optional)_

This proposal enables the customization of the Multus annotation.

**Which issue(s) this PR fixes**:
Fixes #4564

**Checklist**
- [x] Design: A [design document](https://github.com/kubevirt/community/tree/main/design-proposals) was considered and is present (link) or **not required**
- [x] PR: The PR description is expressive enough and will help future contributors
- [x] Code: [Write code that humans can understand](https://en.wikiquote.org/wiki/Martin_Fowler#code-for-humans) and [Keep it simple](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/KISS_principle)
- [x] Refactor: You have [left the code cleaner than you found it (Boy Scout Rule)](https://learning.oreilly.com/library/view/97-things-every/9780596809515/ch08.html)
- [x] Upgrade: Impact of this change on upgrade flows was considered and addressed if requir
